nasb.text: Moreover, they did not require an accounting from the men into whose hand they gave the money to pay to those who did the work, for they dealt faithfully.

esv.text: And they did not ask for an accounting from the men into whose hand they delivered the money to pay out to the workmen, for they dealt honestly.

cnv.text: 他們沒有要求經手把銀子轉付工匠的人交代帳目，因為他們辦事誠實。

ccb.text: 督工们办事忠诚可靠，不需要跟他们清算账目。
